title: Simply Sickles
description: A mod that adds a new weapon to the game, a sickle! (P.S - not used for anything farming related)
body:
A mod that adds a new weapon to the game, a sickle!
Comes in all normal material types (wood, stone, gold, iron, diamond, netherite)
Iron sickle texture taken from Minecraft Dungeons.
The sickle is slightly faster than a sword and does less damage.

**_IMPORTANT:_** the sickles can not yet be used as anything other than a weapon. I plan to change this in future versions.
